appDescription.message: A simple local bookmark manager for Chrome/Chromium inspired by Firefox Places Library patterns.

searchLimitTitle.message: When enabled, search only the current folder and its subfolders. When disabled, search all bookmarks.

currentFolderAndSubfolders.message: 現在のフォルダーとサブフォルダー

chooseSortModeTitle.message: Choose the middle-pane sort mode. Default uses Chromium’s folder order.

emptyDetails.message: Select one item, or select a folder to show its contents.

optionsTitle.message: Simple Bookmarks Manager オプション

userInterface.message: ユーザーインターフェイス

userInterfaceLanguageHelp.message: Automatic follows the browser UI language. Manual choices affect the manager and options pages.

fontHelp.message: Controls the main font family used by the bookmark manager UI.

fontSizeHelp.message: Base text size. Headings and column labels scale relative to this value.

fontSpacingHelp.message: Line spacing multiplier for denser or more readable rows and labels.

searchLimitOptionHelp.message: When enabled, the main search box searches only inside the current visible folder tree.

showDeleteWarningHelp.message: Ask before deleting bookmark items or folders.

showSortWarning.message: 恒久的な並べ替えの確認を表示

showSortWarningHelp.message: Ask before applying context-menu sorts that permanently reorder a bookmark folder.

allowKeyboardDelete.message: Delete キーで選択項目を削除する

allowKeyboardDeleteHelp.message: When disabled, the Delete key no longer deletes selected bookmark entries.

naturalSortHelp.message: Permanent Sort by Name places folders first, separators next, then bookmarks.

enableAdvancedViewingHelp.message: Show read-only advanced bookmark metadata in the Details pane.

enableAdvancedEditingHelp.message: Allow supported advanced editing, currently limited to bookmark index changes.

sortFolderConfirm.message:
Sort "{folderName}" by {sortName}?

This permanently changes the saved bookmark order in Chromium. It is different from the temporary Visual sort dropdown.

addNewBookmark.message: 新しいブックマークを追加

addNewFolder.message: 新しいフォルダーを追加

openAllBookmarks.message: すべてのブックマークを開く

openAllInNewTab.message: すべて新しいタブで開く

openAllInNewWindow.message: すべて新しいウィンドウで開く

openAllInPrivateWindow.message: すべてプライベートウィンドウで開く

openAllInNewTabGroup.message: Open All in New Tab Group

openInNewWindow.message: 新しいウィンドウで開く

openInPrivateWindow.message: プライベートウィンドウで開く

doubleClickExpandCollapseTitle.message: Double-click to expand or collapse this folder

dragItemTitle.message: Drag to move or reorder this item

unsavedChangesMessage.message: The Details pane has unsaved changes. What would you like to do?

sortDefaultTooltip.message: Default Chromium folder order. Click to return to Default sorting; this column does not reverse-sort.

sortNameAscTooltip.message: Sort by name: A to Z

sortNameDescTooltip.message: Sort by name: Z to A

sortUrlAscTooltip.message: Sort by URL: A to Z

sortUrlDescTooltip.message: Sort by URL: Z to A

sortDateAscTooltip.message: Sort by date added: oldest first

sortDateDescTooltip.message: Sort by date added: newest first

sortSelectTitleTitle.message: Name sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortSelectUrlTitle.message: URL sort. Ascending is A to Z; descending is Z to A.

sortSelectDateAddedTitle.message: Date added sort. Ascending is oldest first; descending is newest first.

sortSelectIdTitle.message: ID sort. Ascending is lowest first; descending is highest first.

searchLimitFull.message: Limit Search to Current Folder & Subfolders
